A Harvard man (Robert Young) and his Colonial friend (Walter Brennan) join Rogers' (Spencer Tracy) Rangers in upstate New York.
programme.title: Northwest Passage

programme.desc: Three bumbling janitors encounter a slew of curious creatures after accidentally launching a rocket to Venus.
programme.title: Have Rocket, Will Travel

programme.desc: Lovers quarrel around surfers, Don Rickles, Buster Keaton, Von Zipper's biker gang.
programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo

programme.desc: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts (Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester) on a trip to find the origins of humans.
programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey

programme.desc: A beautiful detective goes undercover to investigate a huge drug ring in Los Angeles.
programme.title: Get Christie Love!

programme.desc: A murdered gangster makes a deal with the devil, agreeing to take over and corrupt a crusading judge's identity in return for avenging his murder.
programme.title: Angel on My Shoulder

programme.desc: The judge's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) goes to college after serving in the war and finds his sweetheart (Bonita Granville) is engaged to someone else.
programme.title: Love Laughs at Andy Hardy

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his sidekicks (Russell Hayden, Andy Clyde) save a gold miner's daughter from a gambler.
programme.title: Pirates on Horseback

programme.desc: A chemist (Dennis O'Keefe), his wife (Ruth Warrick) and a trainer's daughter (Gail Russell) form a romantic triangle around a champion trotter.
programme.title: The Great Dan Patch

programme.desc: A Hollywood wheeler-dealer (William Watters) exploits a motorcycling rock 'n' roller (Arch Hall Jr.) new in town.
programme.title: Wild Guitar

programme.desc: A Quaker (Gail Russell) and her family reform a wounded outlaw (John Wayne) who has a killer on his trail.
programme.title: Angel and the Badman

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) steps in when Dagwood's (Arthur Lake) boss demotes him for buying the wrong real estate.
programme.title: Blondie's Reward

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: For his fiancée's charity a stockbroker bets friends that for 24 hours he will tell only the truth.
programme.title: Nothing but the Truth

programme.desc: Scout William F. Cody (Joel McCrea) marries a U.S. senator's daughter (Maureen O'Hara), fights the Cheyenne and leads a Wild West show.
programme.title: Buffalo Bill

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: A secret agent (Anthony Eisley) and his boss (Wandisa Leigh) check a madman's sabotage of U.S. moonshots.
programme.title: Lightning Bolt

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: Veterans of the 82nd Airborne Division devise an elaborate plot to simultaneously rob five casinos on New Year's Eve.
programme.title: Ocean's Eleven

programme.desc: A killer of Detroit clergy confesses to a priest (Donald Sutherland), who turns sleuth because he cannot tell the police.
programme.title: The Rosary Murders

programme.desc: An exile (John Richardson) from a hostile tribe woos a woman (Raquel Welch) from a gentle tribe amid monsters and an earthquake.
programme.title: One Million Years B.C.

programme.desc: A bomber pilot (Spencer Tracy) goes to heaven and becomes guardian angel to another pilot (Van Johnson) courting his old girlfriend (Irene Dunne).
programme.title: A Guy Named Joe

programme.desc: The mythical Greek hero (Reg Park) rescues a maiden left at the mercy of a beast and goes on to save his son from the sexist queen of lost Atlantis (Fay Spain).
programme.title: Hercules and the Captive Women

programme.desc: Newlyweds (Lucille Ball, Desi Arnaz) splurge on a trailer for their honeymoon, which includes Yosemite National Park.
programme.title: The Long, Long Trailer

programme.desc: To evade gangsters, two men (Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon) don skirts and makeup and join an all-girl band with a sizzling singer (Marilyn Monroe).
programme.title: Some Like It Hot

programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.
programme.title: Firewalker

programme.desc: An English girl's dream of racing her horse in the Grand National thunders to reality with the help of a former jockey.
programme.title: National Velvet

programme.desc: The owner and operator of a rodeo that's an antiquated touring company on its last legs gets an offer from her business rival, to combine their operations -- if she will also consent to be his bride.
programme.title: Lights of Old Santa Fe

programme.desc: A goofy astronaut (Don Knotts) with a fear of heights becomes assistant janitor, then goes on a space mission.
programme.title: The Reluctant Astronaut

programme.desc: A suave stranger (Cary Grant) helps a chic widow (Audrey Hepburn) stalked by four men looking for loot in Paris.
programme.title: Charade

programme.desc: Batman (Adam West) and Robin (Burt Ward) save Gotham City from the Catwoman, Joker (Cesar Romero), Penguin and Riddler.
programme.title: Batman

programme.desc: A man (Mark Damon) seeks revenge after the murder of a relative who left him money.
programme.title: Johnny Yuma

programme.desc: Young Martha inadvertently causes the death of her cruel, authoritarian aunt. Martha lies to the cops, but fear a childhood friend saw it too.
programme.title: The Strange Love of Martha Ivers

programme.desc: The Burma Temple Story Steve travels to Burma to find out who killed a newspaper correspondent posing as a political refugee and why.
programme.title: Dangerous Assignment

programme.desc: S02 E05 — The Positive Negative Mike is abducted by mobsters.
programme.title: Man With a Camera

programme.desc: S01 E17 — Puppy Love Blondie and Dagwood are concerned over Alexander, who appears to be dealing with a bad case of puppy love.
programme.title: Blondie

programme.desc: S06 E01 — Lucy Meets the Berles Lucy thinks Milton Berle is cheating on his wife.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: S01 E29 — Bitter Water When a neighbor agrees to sell his property, the Cartwrights fear the loss of water rights for their cattle.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: A goofy astronaut (Don Knotts) with a fear of heights becomes assistant janitor, then goes on a space mission.
programme.title: The Reluctant Astronaut

programme.desc: An inventor's time machine takes Moe, Larry and Curly Joe to Ancient Greece.
programme.title: The Three Stooges Meet Hercules

programme.desc: Flashbacks tell the story of a tenderfoot who rose to glory by gunning down the outlaw terrorizing his small town.
programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance

programme.desc: A suave stranger (Cary Grant) helps a chic widow (Audrey Hepburn) stalked by four men looking for loot in Paris.
programme.title: Charade

programme.desc: After Herbert (Jerry Lewis) loses his lover, he gives up women for good. To get over them, he takes a maintenance position at boarding house, but to his surprise, the building caters specifically to single ladies.
programme.title: The Ladies' Man

programme.desc: A San Francisco playgirl (Tippi Hedren) follows a bachelor (Rod Taylor) to Bodega Bay where, for no apparent reason, flocks of birds begin killing the populace.
programme.title: The Birds

programme.desc: In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.
programme.title: 1506 - The Lisbon Genocide

programme.desc: Exploring the abduction of 2,000 Jewish children in Portugal following their expulsion from Spain and arrival in Portugal in 1492, an unresolved chapter that still haunts the Jewish community today. Produced by the Jewish Community of Porto.
programme.title: 2,000 Kidnapped Jewish Children
